title: Introducing the Google Apps Integration: Four Apps for the Price of One on monday.com!
excerpt:
Hello monday.com community! 
We are thrilled to announce the launch of our latest app - Google Apps Integration, which allows you to integrate and embed your favourite Google apps like Sheets, Slides, Forms, and Docs, al…

posts.author: arnav_miniOrange (Arnav Ghatage)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello monday.com community!

We are thrilled to announce the launch of our latest app - Google Apps Integration, which allows you to integrate and embed your favourite Google apps like Sheets, Slides, Forms, and Docs, all within the monday.com platform.

With the Google Apps Integration, you can easily avoid the hassle of manually sharing links and instead, share the live and latest version of all your documents with your team, all while staying organized in one place.

Editing and collaborating has never been easier with our two-way editing feature. Edits made within the document will reflect on monday.com, and edits made on monday.com will reflect in the document. This means that you can easily edit and collaborate on your documents within monday.com, streamlining your overall work management.

The Google Apps Integration is compatible with Google Sheets, Slides, Docs, and Forms, making it easier than ever to share and collaborate on all of your favourite Google apps within one platform. And the best part? Our affordable pricing ensures that you can share all of your documents within your organization without breaking the bank.

We are excited to showcase the amazing features of this app and invite you to schedule a quick demo with us today. We are also here to support you and answer any questions you may have. Simply reach out to us at mondaysupport@xecurify.com.

Experience the power of the Google Apps Integration on monday.com today!
